questions.question: What does inheriting from AbstractBlocklockReceiver provide to the SealedBidAuction contract?
options: The ability to request decryption and receive callbacks from dcipher
questions.correctAnswer: The ability to request decryption and receive callbacks from dcipher

questions.question: Why must the revealBlock come after the biddingDeadline?
options: If bids could decrypt while bidding is open, it collapses back to the transparency problem
To give the dcipher network more time
questions.correctAnswer: If bids could decrypt while bidding is open, it collapses back to the transparency problem

questions.question: The ______ mapping links asynchronous blocklock callbacks back to specific auction IDs.
How does the contract decrypt bids in _onBlocklockReceived?
options: It uses the bidder's private key
It loops through all bids and decrypts each using the threshold key provided by dcipher
It asks each bidder to decrypt their own bid
questions.correctAnswer: It loops through all bids and decrypts each using the threshold key provided by dcipher

questions.question: If no one calls requestDecryption after bidding ends, the bids will automatically decrypt when the reveal block is reached.
Why do we need to pay ETH when calling requestDecryption?
options: To cover the gas cost of the dcipher callback transaction
To lock in the bid amounts
questions.correctAnswer: To cover the gas cost of the dcipher callback transaction

questions.question: What determines the winner of the auction?
options: The highest decrypted bid that meets the minimum bid requirement
Random selection from all valid bids
questions.correctAnswer: The highest decrypted bid that meets the minimum bid requirement
